prompts.global_base: systems-failure editorial collage, zero-letter image logic, recognizable historical fragments redesigned as a restrained layered montage, one anchor fragment plus layered support fragments, torn paper, soft paper seams, distressed print texture, fragmented historical imagery, dark-cream field split, oxidized teal, muted copper, pale lilac accents, designed asymmetry, serious and investigative, no clear faces, non-photographic, non-heroic, institutional, unsensational, anti-gloss futurism
prompts.scene_base: calmer editorial scene plate, one dominant architectural or systems anchor survives as the first read, support fragments stay subordinate, collage tension comes from materials and evidence rather than poster-card compression or scenic realism, traces of human presence only, safe-zone aware composition
prompts.packaging_base: bold packaging collage, clear small-size legibility through silhouette and value contrast, recognizable anchor object carried by a dominant anchor fragment and layered support fragments, poster montage logic, controlled overlays only, title-friendly negative space, serious rather than lurid
prompts.thumbnail_base: landscape poster montage, anchor fragment weighted right or center-right, left-side or upper-left quiet field preserved for title lockup, strong value split, broad silhouette, support fragments reinforce the anchor without dissolving the read
prompts.shorts_base: portrait poster montage, anchor fragment large and mobile-legible, recognizable anchor object centered in stacked vertical layering, controlled torn edges, strong header-safe negative space, support fragments stay subordinate to the main signal
prompts.refine_base: preserve the anchor fragment, preserve the layered support fragments, preserve torn paper and soft paper seams, add edge clarity and material depth without collapsing into realism, readable marks, monitor-wall mosaics, or oversized ripped-paper slabs
prompts.final_base: canonical final deliverable, preserve the anchor fragment, preserve the layered support fragments and the support-fragment hierarchy, preserve reserved negative space, preserve zero-letter editorial collage language, preserve palette control and non-readable overlays
